## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Shell as Bash
  participant Runner as python-lambda-local
  participant Handler as postEventHandler.py:lambda_handler
  participant TestJSON as test_container_and_event.json

  Shell->>Shell: echo "locations get"
  Shell->>Shell: set PYTHONPATH (container_tracking_service)
  Shell->>Shell: append common fv python path
  Shell->>Runner: execute with env AWS_DEFAULT_REGION=us-east-1, AWS_STAGE=dev, AWS_PROFILE=default
  Runner->>Handler: invoke lambda_handler (timeout 120)
  Handler->>TestJSON: read test_container_and_event.json
  TestJSON-->>Handler: provide event payload
  Handler-->>Runner: return result/response
  Runner-->>Shell: exit with status
```
